attacking_style: Thrives in breakaways on extreme gradient finales, capable of dominating when the road tilts beyond 20%. Shows ability to sustain efforts on brutal climbs where pure climbing strength trumps tactics.
team_tactics: Insufficient data to establish team tactical patterns from single race observation.
terrain_preference: Excels on exceptionally steep gradients (20%+) where power-to-weight and climbing resilience are decisive. Likely suited to punchy, explosive finales rather than sustained high-altitude efforts.
vulnerability: Unknown vulnerability profile with single observation; likely struggles in head-to-head situations against GC contenders on conventional climbs.
key_patterns: Breakaway specialist: Won from the break rather than main group action.
Extreme gradient specialist: Dominated on 24% finale showing strength on steepest pitches.
Late-career emergence: First GT stage win at 30 suggests experience-driven peak.
form_trajectory: positive: Achieved first grand tour stage win at age 30, indicating late-career form peak and newfound competitiveness at highest level
built_from: 2022 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 9
